/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/osd_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/osd_unittest.dir/osd_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/osd_unittest.dir/__/__/main/io/osd_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/osd_unittest.dir/__/__/main/io/displayport_msp_osd.c.o CMakeFiles/osd_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/typeconversion.c.o CMakeFiles/osd_unittest.dir/osd_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o osd_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
